hidden_state.goal: Figure out how to add AI features to their small e-commerce site
hidden_state.hidden_truth: Their site only gets 200 visitors per day — most AI solutions require scale to justify the investment and maintenance cost

opening_input: I've been reading about AI and I think we should add some AI features to our online store. We sell handmade jewelry and I'm wondering if there's something we could do with product recommendations or maybe a chatbot? I'm not really sure what's possible but I've seen other stores doing it.
behavioral_rules: Writes long paragraphs. Volunteers extra context freely. Needs help narrowing scope — has too many ideas and no constraints. Will accept any reframe.
